title: gumira bengalensis
intro: Gumira bengalensis, also known as the Bengal gumira tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gumira bengalensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems due to its antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Gumira bengalensis involve boiling its bark in water to create a decoction, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
